headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -86.0)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 91% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 115 quotes and an overwhelming 99 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and discontent today.

• At 90.6, frustration levels are well above typical but still within the normal range for this period.

• Fears recovered significantly from yesterday's very low point, while optimism improved slightly but remains subdued.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
